div.style: font-size:13px; font-weight:bold; color:#0F2447; font-family:Georgia,'Times New Roman',serif; margin-top:2px;
font-size:13px; font-weight:bold; color:#0F2447; font-family:Georgia,'Times New Roman',serif; margin-top:2px;
font-size:13px; font-weight:bold; color:#0F2447; font-family:Georgia,'Times New Roman',serif; margin-top:2px;

td.style: padding:8px 12px; border:1px solid #C8D8F0; background-color:#EBF3FF; vertical-align:top; white-space:nowrap;

div.style: font-size:13px; font-weight:bold; color:#0F2447; font-family:Georgia,'Times New Roman',serif; margin-top:2px;

span.t-att-style: 'display:inline-block; width:8px; height:8px; background-color:%s; margin-right:5px; vertical-align:middle;' % (tl.tier_id.color or '#3498db')

span.style: color:#FFFFFF; font-size:10px; font-weight:bold; margin:0 8px; font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif; text-transform:uppercase;

div.style: font-size:16px; font-weight:bold; color:#FFFFFF; font-family:Georgia,'Times New Roman',serif; margin-top:2px;
font-size:16px; font-weight:bold; color:#E8A020; font-family:Georgia,'Times New Roman',serif; margin-top:2px;
font-size:16px; font-weight:bold; color:#6AE085; font-family:Georgia,'Times New Roman',serif; margin-top:2px;
font-size:16px; font-weight:bold; color:#FFFFFF; font-family:Georgia,'Times New Roman',serif; margin-top:2px;
font-size:16px; font-weight:bold; color:#FFFFFF; font-family:Georgia,'Times New Roman',serif; margin-top:2px;
margin-top:10px; margin-bottom:6px; padding:6px 10px; border-left:3px solid #E8A020; background-color:#FAFCFF;
div.span: Fill in player details below after the auction. Each row represents one squad slot.

div.style: font-size:16px; font-weight:bold; color:#0F2447; font-family:Georgia,'Times New Roman',serif; margin-top:2px;
font-size:16px; font-weight:bold; color:#0F2447; font-family:Georgia,'Times New Roman',serif; margin-top:2px;
font-size:16px; font-weight:bold; color:#0F2447; font-family:Georgia,'Times New Roman',serif; margin-top:2px;
font-size:16px; font-weight:bold; color:#9AAFC8; font-family:Georgia,'Times New Roman',serif; margin-top:2px;
font-size:16px; font-weight:bold; color:#9AAFC8; font-family:Georgia,'Times New Roman',serif; margin-top:2px;
